seoTitle: Schofields vs Scone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Schofields and Scone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Schofields and Scone.
heading: Schofields vs Scone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Schofields, New South Wales and Scone, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scone has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Schofields (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Schofields or Scone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Schofields has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Scone scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Schofields scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Scone scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Schofields or Scone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
